talk_to_user.description: Display a question or message to the user and wait for keyboard input with timeout. This tool allows interactive communication with the user. In infinite loop mode, use timeout=-1 to disable timeout when notifying task completion.

query.description: The question or message to display to the user

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for user response in seconds (default: 10 seconds, -1 to disable timeout)

tale_scienceworld_action.description: Execute one ScienceWorld action. Tool auto-starts episode on first call and auto-closes when done.

action.description: One textual action sent to environment.

env_name.description: Target env/task name. Required on first call of a task.

task_index.description: Task index fallback when env_name omitted.

restart.description: Force start a new task and drop current active task.

tale_suite_root.description: Optional absolute path to tale-suite root.
